title: Diesel Hoodie — Grey
image_captions: Grey Diesel hoodie with black 'DIESEL' logo on chest. No tape measure, tag, or care label visible.
Grey Diesel hoodie with black 'DIESEL' logo on chest. No tape measure, tag, or care label visible.
Detail shot showing the ribbed cuffs and hem of a grey sweatshirt. No tape measure, brand tag, or care label is visible in this image.
Front view showing grey hoodie with black 'DIESEL' logo on chest.
Detail shot showing black 'L' and partial letter on grey heathered fabric.
Detail shot showing silver metal grommets with 'DIESEL' branding on grey hoodie drawstrings and vertical stitching.
Back view showing grey fleece interior with black size tag reading M and silver grommet on drawstring.
Neck tag reading RN 93243 CA 25594. Care label showing UK: 60% COTTON - 40% POLYESTER.
Vertical tape measure showing 60cm at the hem edge of grey ribbed fabric.
Horizontal tape measure showing 54cm at the garment's edge.
Back view showing grey hoodie with hood and ribbed hem. No visible logo or text.
enhanced_description:
Diesel Hoodie — Grey
Brand: Diesel
Size: M
Condition: Excellent
Composition: 60% Cotton - 40% Polyester
Color: Grey

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 54cm
Length: 60cm

About the Piece
This is a classic Diesel hoodie in a versatile grey heathered wash. The soft cotton-polyester blend offers everyday comfort, while the signature branding adds that distinct streetwear edge you're looking for. Perfect for layering or wearing as a standalone piece.

Style Note: Urban Streetwear / Minimalist Essential

Key Detail
Silver metal grommets on drawstrings with 'DIESEL' branding and ribbed cuffs/hem for durability.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more Diesel items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
